S

searchEntrantsByEmail_showsOnlyMatchingEntrant() - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantListActivityTest
Verifies that searching by email filters the visible list.
searchEntrantsByName_showsOnlyMatchingEntrant() - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantListActivityTest
Verifies that searching by name filters the visible list.
selectingWaitingTab_showsWaitingEntrants() - 类中的方法 com.example.eventparticipation.EntrantListActivityTest
Verifies that selecting the Waiting tab shows the current waiting entrants.
